# LeakSanitizer suppressions for fastchart CI.
#
# fastchart 1.0 has zero LSan-reported leaks of its own. These
# suppressions cover known persistent allocations from ext/gd's MINIT,
# which the test suite loads only for PHP-side image validation
# (imagecreatefromstring / imagesx / imagesy in raster round-trip
# tests). They are intentional process-lifetime allocations, not bugs.
#
# Format: "leak:<substring>" — substring must appear in any frame of
# the leak's stack trace. Use function or library names. Anchors are
# unsupported.
#
# To audit a new leak locally:
#   ASAN_OPTIONS=detect_leaks=1 LSAN_OPTIONS=fast_unwind_on_malloc=0 \
#     <php> -d extension=fastchart.so -r '<repro>'

# ext/gd MINIT — class registration, constant table, persistent INI
# entries. ~11KB total, one-time at module load.
leak:register_gd_symbols
leak:php_gd_object_minit_helper
leak:php_gd_font_minit_helper
leak:zm_startup_gd

# libgd's optional FreeType-bundled font cache mutex (allocated once
# at MINIT, freed at MSHUTDOWN, but LSan may report at exit).
leak:gdFontCacheMutexSetup
